queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the requested credit amount as a determinant of credit default probability and its contribution to increased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Assessment of the association between a negative checking account balance and elevated credit risk in loan default models.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Evaluation of the absence of a checking account as a significant driver of credit risk and its impact on default likelihood.
